= NixOS =
Learning my way around NixOS.

== Table of Contents ==
# [[#to-dos|To-Do's]]
# [[#miscellaneous-enhancement|Miscellaneous Enhancement]]
# [[#references|References]]

== To-Do's ==

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! &#35; !! Task !! Status !! Remarks
|-
| 1 || Hyprland || 🚧 In Progress || To replace KDE Plasma?
|-
| 2 || Home Manager || 🚧 In Progress || Need modular user management structure, likely to be separated out into its own module.
|-
| 3 || Immich || To Do || &nbsp;
|-
| 4 || Terraform || To Do || &nbsp;
|-
| 5 || Podman || To Do || &nbsp;
|-
| 6 || Kubernetes || To Do || &nbsp;
|-
| 7 || HomeLab || To Do || &nbsp;
|-
| 8 || .dotfiles || To Do || &nbsp;
|-
| 9 || Include WSL || To Do || Try to include WSL builds in this repository.
|-
| 10 || Neofetch || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|-
| 11 || WireGuard VPN || ✅ Done || Done as part of Deluge module, works in separate namespace, only Deluge traffic goes through VPN but not the rest of the system. Disabled entirely/not installed due to unable to find (i.e. unwilling to pay for) suitable VPN provider currently.
|-
| 12 || Deluge || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|-
| 13 || RQuickShare || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|-
| 14 || Jellyfin || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|-
| 15 || ZOXide || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|-
| 16 || fzf || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|-
| 17 || Default shell/Zsh with Powerline || ✅ Done || &nbsp;
|}

== Miscellaneous Enhancement ==

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! &#35; !! Task !! Status !! Remarks
|-
| 1 || Jellyfin Plugins || To Do || Must-have plugins & to codify them too (as part of <code>01-jellyfin</code> module).
|-
| 2 || Versions (Auto) Upgrade || To Do || Figure out how to enable auto version upgrade for the OS and applications.
|-
| 3 || Fix variables structure || To Do || You know how you can put all variables into a single file in Terraform?
|-
| 4 || Jellyfin Directory || ✅ Done || Include <code>shows</code> directory into the code.
|}

== References ==
Guidance which I try to follow as best practice:
# [https://github.com/MatthiasBenaets/nix-config/tree/master MatthiasBenaets/nix-config: My Personal Nix, NixOS and Nix-Darwin System Configuration Flake]
# [https://nixos-and-flakes.thiscute.world: NixOS & Flakes Book | Home Page]
